name: FileObjReadOptions.UseObjGsAs
summary: Determines how "g"s in the obj file will be interpreted on import

enum_values.name: IgnoreObjGroups
enum_values.summary: OBJ "g"s in the file are ignored

enum_values.name: ObjGroupsAsLayers
enum_values.summary: OBJ "g"s in the file will become Rhino layers

enum_values.name: ObjGroupsAsGroups
enum_values.summary: OBJ "g"s in the file will become Rhino groups

enum_values.name: ObjGroupsAsObjects
enum_values.summary: OBJ "g"s in the file will become Rhino objects
